title: sophora benthamii
intro: Sophora benthamii, also known as the Kiri or Hong Kong Sophora, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to detoxify and protect the liver. The health benefits of Sophora benthamii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In traditional medicine, Sophora benthamii is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
